Step:5 Engage your chest muscles and bring your arms forward in a sweeping motion.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the center, then slowly return your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable one arm bent over row
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with one hand, palm facing inward, and extend your arm fully.
Step:4 Pull the cable handle towards your body, keeping your elbow close to your side, until your hand reaches your lower chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly extend your arm back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
nameFr: Poulie Un Bras Buste penché Penché Rowing

name: cable one arm curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing up.
Step:3 Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable one arm decline chest fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and set the bench to a decline angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your head towards the machine and grab the handle with your right hand.
Step:3 Extend your arm straight up above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:4 With a controlled motion, lower your arm out to the side until your hand is in line with your shoulder.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then reverse the motion and bring your arm back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to your left arm and repeat the exercise.
nameFr: Poulie Un Bras Décliné Pectoraux Écarté

name: cable one arm incline press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine to a low pulley position.
Step:2 Sit on an incline bench facing away from the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with one hand and bring it up to shoulder height.
Step:4 Position your feet firmly on the ground and maintain a stable position.
Step:5 Press the handle forward and upward, extending your arm fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handle back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: cable one arm lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with one hand, palm facing down, and stand far enough away from the machine so that there is tension on the cable.
Step:3 Keep your arm straight and slowly raise it out to the side until it is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: cable one arm preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher curl pad.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Slowly curl the cable handle towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm against the pad.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:9 Switch arms and repeat the exercise.

name: cable one arm pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Attach a single handle to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and extend your arm fully.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the handle down towards your side while keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your lat muscle.
Step:7 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:9 Switch sides and repeat the exercise with the other arm.

name: cable one arm reverse preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the lowest position.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip and position your upper arm against the preacher bench pad.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Slowly curl your forearm towards your bicep, keeping your upper arm stationary against the pad.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your bicep.
Step:7 Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:9 Switch arms and repeat the exercise.
nameFr: Poulie Un Bras Prise inversée Pupitre Curl

name: cable one arm tricep pushdown
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with a straight bar attachment at chest height.
Step:2 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip and step back to create tension in the cable.
Step:3 Position your feet shoulder-width apart and slightly bend your knees.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Start with your arm fully extended and perpendicular to the floor.
Step:6 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and push the bar down until your arm is fully extended.
Step:7 Pause for a moment, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: cable overhead curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a high pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and curl the bar down towards your forehead, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Poulie Au-dessus de la tête Curl

name: cable overhead triceps extension (rope attachment)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine at a high position.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing each other, and bring your hands above your head.
Step:4 Keep your upper arms close to your head and your elbows pointing forward.
Step:5 Slowly lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Poulie Au-dessus de la tête Triceps Extension Corde Attachment)

name: cable preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height.
Step:2 Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the cable attachment with an underhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your elbows tucked in at your sides.
Step:4 Slowly curl the cable attachment up towards your shoulders, squeezing your biceps at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the cable attachment back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable pull through (with rope)
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing away from the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grab the rope attachment with both hands and step forward, creating tension in the cable.
Step:3 Bend at the hips and lower your upper body until it is parallel to the ground, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and hamstrings to pull your body back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable pulldown machine so that the seat is at a comfortable height and the knee pad is secured.
Step:2 Sit on the seat with your back straight and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the cable bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back slightly and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the cable bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable pulldown (pro lat bar)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your thighs are parallel to the ground and your feet are flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the lat bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit down and lean back slightly, keeping your chest up and your back straight.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable pulldown bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and slowly curl the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your wrists straight.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly return the bar to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable rear delt row (stirrups)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a stirrup handle to a low cable pulley and stand facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with your left hand and take a step back with your right foot, positioning your body at a slight angle.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 With your left arm extended and your palm facing down, pull the handle towards your chest by retracting your shoulder blade.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your shoulder blade.
Step:6 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:7 Switch sides and repeat the exercise with your right arm.

name: cable rear delt row (with rope)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope handle to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope handle with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Keep your elbows slightly bent and pull the rope towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Poulie Arrière Delt Rowing Avec Corde

name: cable rear pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the pulley is at the highest position.
Step:2 Sit facing the machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the cable attachment with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your chest up.
Step:5 Pull the cable attachment down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the cable back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable reverse crunch
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and lie down facing up on a mat.
Step:2 Hold the cable with both hands and extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lift your legs up, bringing your thighs towards your chest.
Step:4 While keeping your upper body stable, curl your pelvis up towards your chest, lifting your hips off the mat.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable reverse curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable reverse one arm curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palm facing down.
Step:3 Keep your elbow close to your side and slowly curl your forearm up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your forearm back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Poulie Prise inversée Un Bras Curl

name: cable reverse preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the preacher curl pad is at chest height.
Step:2 Sit on the preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, with your palms facing down and your elbows fully extended.
Step:3 Grab the cable handles with an underhand grip, shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable reverse wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and sit on a bench facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, with your wrists hanging off the edge.
Step:4 Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable rope crossover seated row
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the rowing machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the cable ropes with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Lean back slightly, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the cable ropes towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable rope elevated seated row
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the elevated seat facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Grab the cable rope handles with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly back, maintaining a slight bend in your knees.
Step:4 Pull the cable towards your body by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully contracted position.
Step:6 Slowly release the tension and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable rope extension incline bench row
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle and attach a cable machine to the low pulley.
Step:2 Attach a rope handle to the cable machine and sit on the incline bench facing the machine.
Step:3 Grab the rope handle with an overhand grip and lean forward, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, pulling the rope towards your upper chest while keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the end of the movement.
Step:6 Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Poulie Corde Extension Incliné Couché Rowing

name: cable rope hammer preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope attachment to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other).
Step:4 Position your upper arms against the preacher bench pad, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the rope towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the rope back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable rope incline tricep extension
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a high pulley and adjust the incline bench to a comfortable angle.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the pulley with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight overhead.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your head and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Lower the rope behind your head by bending your elbows until your forearms touch your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable rope seated row
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the rowing machine with your feet flat on the footrests and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the cable ropes with an overhand grip, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward, maintaining a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pull the cable ropes towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable seated chest press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and cable handles to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back straight and feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip at shoulder height.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body, extending your arms fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable seated crunch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with both hands and position it behind your head.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly curl your upper body forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable seated curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a cable machine with your feet flat on the ground and your back straight.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable seated high row (v-bar)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable machine with your feet flat on the floor and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip, palms facing each other, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips.
Step:4 Pull the v-bar towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Poulie Assis Haut Rowing Barre v

name: cable seated one arm concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor and your back straight.
Step:2 Hold a cable handle with one hand and place your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the cable handle towards your shoulder while exhaling.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position while inhaling.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
nameFr: Poulie Assis Un Bras Concentration Curl

name: cable seated overhead curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the cable attachment with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your upper arms stationary and your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Exhale and curl the cable attachment towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the cable attachment back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Poulie Assis Au-dessus de la tête Curl

name: cable seated rear lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench facing the cable machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms straight in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, slowly raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable seated row
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, keeping your back straight and your shoulders relaxed.
Step:3 Pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable seated wide-grip row
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with a wide overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips.
Step:4 Pull the handle towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the contraction.
Step:6 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the handles are at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and bring them up to shoulder level, with your elbows bent and pointing outwards.
Step:4 Press the handles upwards until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable side crunch
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and stand sideways to the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with the hand furthest from the machine and place your other hand on your hip.
Step:3 Keep your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 With your abs engaged, bend sideways at the waist, bringing your elbow down towards your hip.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: cable squat row (with rope attachment)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine at waist height.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:4 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, with your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and pull the rope towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Keep your elbows close to your body and continue pulling until your hands reach your chest.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the rope and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Poulie Squat Rowing Avec Corde Attachment)

name: cable squatting curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to the lowest setting on a cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the cable handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and arms fully extended.
Step:4 Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your back straight and knees behind your toes.
Step:5 As you squat down, curl the cable handle towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the curl, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable standing back wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your arms straight and your elbows close to your sides.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the cable handle towards your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable standing calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hold onto the cable machine handles or attach a cable ankle strap to your ankles.
Step:3 Raise your heels off the ground by extending your ankles as high as possible.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable standing cross-over high reverse fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach a D-handle to each side of a cable machine at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand in the middle of the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and extend your arms out to the sides, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Keep a slight bend in your elbows and maintain a straight back throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Engage your shoulder muscles and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles towards the front of your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Poulie Debout Croisé Haut Prise inversée Écarté

name: cable standing crunch
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to a high pulley and stand facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Hold the handle with both hands and place it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent.
Step:3 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Keeping your abs engaged, exhale and crunch your torso down towards your knees, bringing your elbows towards your thighs.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable standing crunch (with rope attachment)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hold the rope with both hands and bring it behind your head, keeping your elbows bent.
Step:4 Engage your abs and slowly crunch your torso forward, bringing your elbows towards your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the crunch, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Poulie Debout Crunch Avec Corde Attachment)

name: cable standing fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach the handles to the cables at chest height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing away from the cable machine.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, palms facing forward.
Step:4 Step forward slightly to create tension in the cables.
Step:5 Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:6 With a slight bend in your elbows, slowly bring your arms forward and together in front of your chest.
Step:7 Squeeze your chest muscles at the peak of the movement.
Step:8 Slowly reverse the movement, returning your arms to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable standing hip extension
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and stand facing away from the machine.
Step:2 Place the cable around your ankle and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your core engaged and your back straight throughout the exercise.
Step:4 Slowly extend your leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
Step:7 Switch sides and repeat with the other leg.

name: cable standing inner curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handle with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Exhale and curl the cable handle towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the cable handle back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable standing one arm triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the cable machine.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle with your right hand, palm facing down, and position your arm so that it is fully extended and parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Keep your elbow stationary and close to your body.
Step:4 Slowly bend your elbow, lowering the cable handle towards the back of your head.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform the exercise with your left arm.
nameFr: Poulie Debout Un Bras Triceps Extension

name: cable standing pulldown (with rope)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:5 Pull the rope down towards your thighs, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the rope back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Poulie Debout Tirage vertical Avec Corde

name: cable standing row (v-bar)
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the v-bar attachment with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the v-bar towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable standing twist row (v-bar)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a v-bar attachment to a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing the cable machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the v-bar with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:4 Take a step back to create tension in the cable.
Step:5 Keep your back straight and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Pull the v-bar towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blades and bending your elbows.
Step:7 As you pull, twist your torso to one side, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:8 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, feeling the contraction in your upper back.
Step:9 Slowly release the tension and return to the starting position, untwisting your torso.
Step:10 Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, alternating the twisting direction with each rep.
nameFr: Poulie Debout Twist Rowing Barre v

name: cable straight arm pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to the high pulley of a cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, keeping your arms straight and your palms facing down.
Step:4 Engage your lats and pull the bar down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight throughout the movement.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly return the bar to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Poulie Jambes tendues Bras Tirage vertical

name: cable straight arm pulldown (with rope)
instructions: Step:1 Attach a rope to the cable machine at the highest setting.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the rope with both hands, palms facing down.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully in front of you, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Engage your lats and slowly pull the rope down towards your thighs, keeping your arms straight.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly release the tension and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Poulie Jambes tendues Bras Tirage vertical Avec Corde

name: cable straight back seated row
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the cable row machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the cable handles with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward from the hips.
Step:4 Pull the cable handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Poulie Jambes tendues Dos Assis Rowing

name: cable supine reverse fly
instructions: Step:1 Attach a D-handle to a low pulley cable machine and lie face down on a flat bench.
Step:2 Grasp the D-handle with each hand, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight out in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your arms straight, raise them out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable thibaudeau kayak row
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable handle to a low pulley and sit facing the machine with your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with your right hand and extend your arm fully, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:3 Lean forward from your hips, keeping your back straight and your abs engaged.
Step:4 Pull the handle towards your torso by retracting your shoulder blade and bending your elbow, keeping your arm close to your body.
Step:5 Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and perform with your left arm.

name: cable tuck reverse crunch
instructions: Step:1 Attach a cable to a low pulley and lie down on a mat facing up.
Step:2 Hold the cable with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lift your legs up, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 At the same time, curl your pelvis up towards your chest, lifting your hips off the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and hips back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable two arm tricep kickback
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the cable handle in each hand with your palms facing inwards and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, extend your forearms backwards until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable underhand pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the cable machine so that the pulldown bar is at a height above your head.
Step:2 Sit down on the seat and grab the pulldown bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and lean back slightly.
Step:4 Pull the bar down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable upper row
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a cable machine at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:5 Pull the bar towards your upper chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the bar back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable upright row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold the cable attachment with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Pull the cable attachment straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Slowly lower the cable attachment back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cable wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Attach a straight bar to a low pulley cable machine.
Step:2 Stand facing the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Rest your forearms on a bench or pad, with your wrists hanging off the edge.
Step:5 Keeping your forearms stationary, exhale and curl your wrists upward as far as possible.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the bar back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: calf stretch with hands against wall
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall with your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Place your hands against the wall at shoulder height.
Step:3 Step your right foot back, keeping your heel on the ground and your leg straight.
Step:4 Bend your left knee and lean forward, keeping your back leg straight and your heel on the ground.
Step:5 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:6 Switch legs and repeat the stretch.

name: cambered bar lying row
instructions: Step:1 Set up a barbell on the floor and lie face down on a bench with your chest just off the edge.
Step:2 Reach down and grab the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 With your legs straight and feet on the ground, lift the barbell off the floor by extending your arms.
Step:4 Pull the barbell towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: chest dip
instructions: Step:1 Position yourself on parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your shoulders are below your elbows.
Step:3 Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: chest dip on straight bar
instructions: Step:1 Grab the parallel bars with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Step:2 Bend your knees and cross your ankles.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your arms until your shoulders are below your elbows.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Pectoraux Dips On Jambes tendues Bar

name: chest tap push-up (male)
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower yourself, tap your chest with your right hand.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, this time tapping your chest with your left hand.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: chin-up
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:3 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: chin-ups (narrow parallel grip)
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with a narrow parallel grip, palms facing towards you.
Step:2 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: clap push up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged.
Step:3 Push through your palms explosively to propel your body off the ground.
Step:4 While in mid-air, clap your hands together before landing back in the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: clock push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 As you lower, rotate your body to the left, extending your left arm straight out to the side.
Step:4 Push back up to the starting position, while rotating your body to the center.
Step:5 Repeat the push-up, this time rotating your body to the right and extending your right arm out to the side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides with each repetition.

name: close grip chin-up
instructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with your palms facing towards you and your hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: cross body crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground and twist to bring your right elbow towards your left knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: crunch (hands overhead)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight above your head.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: crunch floor
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your shoulders off the ground, curling forward towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your shoulders back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: curl-up
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: curtsey squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step diagonally behind and across your body with your right foot, crossing it behind your left leg.
Step:3 Bend both knees as if you were curtsying, lowering your body towards the ground.
Step:4 Keep your torso upright and your weight on your front foot.
Step:5 Push through your front foot to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side, stepping diagonally behind and across your body with your left foot.

name: decline crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your knees bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or across your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your upper body towards your knees, curling your torso.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: decline push-up
instructions: Step:1 Place your hands on the ground slightly wider than shoulder-width apart, with your feet elevated on a stable surface.
Step:2 Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe, engaging your core muscles.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Step:4 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: deep push up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Step:3 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: diamond push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands close together, forming a diamond shape with your thumbs and index fingers.
Step:2 Keep your body in a straight line from head to toe, engaging your core and glutes.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the diamond shape formed by your hands, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: donkey calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your toes on an elevated surface, such as a step or block.
Step:2 Place your hands on a stable support, such as a wall or railing, for balance.
Step:3 Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: drop push up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Once your chest is just above the ground, quickly drop your knees to the ground.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell arnold press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms are facing forward at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell arnold press v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with back support and hold a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level, palms facing your body and elbows bent.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended and your palms are facing forward.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists as you lift, so that your palms end up facing forward at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, with your palms facing forward and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell bench seated press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Lean back and position the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell bench squat
instructions: Step:1 Place a dumbbell on the ground in front of a bench.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the bench with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend at the knees and hips to lower yourself down towards the bench, keeping your chest up and back straight.
Step:4 Once your glutes touch the bench, push through your heels to stand back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell bent over row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Let your arms hang straight down towards the floor, with your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell bicep curl with stork stance
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Extend one leg behind you, balancing on the toes of that foot.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.
nameFr: Haltère Biceps Curl Avec Stork Stance

name: dumbbell biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell biceps curl (with arm blaster)
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Haltère Biceps Curl Avec Bras Blaster)

name: dumbbell biceps curl reverse
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell biceps curl squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your elbows close to your sides, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:4 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell close grip press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Using your thighs to help raise the dumbbells, lift the dumbbells one at a time so that you can hold them in front of you at shoulder width.
Step:3 Once at shoulder width, rotate your wrists forward so that the palms of your hands are facing away from you. This will be your starting position.
Step:4 As you breathe in, slowly lower the dumbbells to your side until they are about level with your chest.
Step:5 As you exhale, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells back to the starting position. Make sure to use only your triceps and do not use your forearms or biceps to help lift the dumbbells.
Step:6 After a second pause at the contracted position, repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.

name: dumbbell concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your legs spread apart and a dumbbell in one hand, resting your elbow on the inside of your thigh.
Step:2 Fully extend your arm and hold the dumbbell with an underhand grip.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight up towards your shoulder while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell contralateral forward lunge
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending both knees until your right thigh is parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell cross body hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps, bringing the dumbbells across your body towards your opposite shoulder.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell cuban press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down.
Step:2 Keeping your core engaged and your elbows slightly bent, press the dumbbells up and overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell cuban press v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height with your palms facing down.
Step:2 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells straight up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:3 Rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing forward.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder height, rotating your wrists back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing forward.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body, arms extended downwards.
Step:3 Bend at your hips and knees, lowering the dumbbells towards the ground while keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Push through your heels and extend your hips and knees, lifting the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell decline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells slowly to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell decline fly
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell decline hammer press
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your feet secured and your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended above your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell decline one arm fly
instructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:2 Using your thigh to help raise the dumbbell, lift it up to shoulder width with your palm facing your torso.
Step:3 Rotate your wrist so that the palm of your hand is facing forward.
Step:4 As you breathe in, lower the dumbbell slowly to the side until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Exhale and use your chest muscles to bring the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell decline one arm hammer press
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your chest.
Step:2 Extend your arm straight up, keeping your elbow slightly bent.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbell down towards your shoulder, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
nameFr: Haltère Décliné Un Bras Marteau Développé

name: dumbbell decline triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells slowly behind your head, bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell decline twist fly
instructions: Step:1 Lie down on a decline bench with your head lower than your hips.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing each other and your arms extended straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 As you lower the dumbbells, twist your wrists so that your palms face forward at the bottom of the movement.
Step:5 Reverse the motion and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position, squeezing your chest muscles at the top.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell fly
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower your arms out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell forward lunge triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight overhead, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then straighten your arms to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions, then switch legs and repeat.

name: dumbbell front raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Step:2 Keeping your arms straight, exhale and lift the dumbbells in front of you until they are at shoulder level.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell front raise v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your thighs.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Slowly lift the dumbbells in front of you, with your arms straight, until they are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell full can lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell goblet squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell vertically against your chest with both hands.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down into a squat position by pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: dumbbell hammer curl v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: dumbbell high curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms stationary and curl the dumbbells as high as possible while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed firmly against the bench.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and lift them to shoulder height.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:5 Push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward, and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline curl
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on the incline bench and let your elbows hang down, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline curl v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline fly
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Lie back on the bench and press the dumbbells up to the starting position, directly above your chest.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keep your back against the bench and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 While keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline hammer press
instructions: Step:1 Set an incline bench to a 45-degree angle and sit on it with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Lie back on the bench and position the dumbbells at shoulder level with your palms facing each other.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells up and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline inner biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on the bench, allowing your elbows to hang down and your palms to face forward.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline one arm fly
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the incline bench to a 30-45 degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:3 Lie back on the bench, keeping your feet flat on the ground.
Step:4 Hold the dumbbell with your arm extended straight up over your chest.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:6 Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the motion to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell incline one arm hammer press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh.
Step:2 Lean back on the bench and use your thigh to help raise the dumbbell to shoulder height.
Step:3 Rotate your wrist so that your palm is facing inward, towards your body.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell up and away from your body, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
nameFr: Haltère Incliné Un Bras Marteau Développé

name: dumbbell incline one arm lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on your thigh.
Step:2 Lean forward and position your upper arm against the inside of your thigh.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm slightly bent and your palm facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
nameFr: Haltère Incliné Un Bras Latéral Élévation

name: dumbbell incline one arm press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your thigh.
Step:2 Lie back on the bench and position the dumbbell at shoulder level, palm facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbell upward and slightly inward, extending your arm fully.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: dumbbell incline palm-in press
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Plant your feet firmly on the ground and keep your back straight against the bench.
Step:4 Start with the dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows bent and palms facing each other.
Step:5 Press the dumbbells up and away from your body, extending your arms fully.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline rear lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your chest against the backrest and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight down with your palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline row
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Grab a dumbbell in each hand and sit on the bench with your chest against the incline.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully, allowing the dumbbells to hang straight down from your shoulders.
Step:4 Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbells back to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell incline two arm extension
instructions: Step:1 Sit on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Slowly lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbells close to your chest.
Step:3 Once you are fully lying down, extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lateral raise
