instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lateral to front raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Next, raise your arms in front of you until they are parallel to the ground, again keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lunge
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up as you lower your body.
Step:4 Push through your right heel to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg.
Step:6 Alternate legs for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lunge with bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing forward.

Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position. Your right knee should be bent at a 90-degree angle and your left knee should be hovering just above the ground.
Step:3 As you lunge forward, simultaneously curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the lunge, then push through your right heel to return to the starting position, lowering the dumbbells back down to your sides.
Step:5 Repeat the lunge and bicep curl on the opposite side, stepping forward with your left foot.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying elbow press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up over your chest.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbells towards your shoulders by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then press the dumbbells back up to the starting position by extending your elbows.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying extension (across face)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your head at the end of the bench.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your chest, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the dumbbell in an arc behind your head until your forearms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then contract your triceps to bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying hammer press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other and arms extended straight up.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbells to the sides of your chest, keeping your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying one arm press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the dumbbell at shoulder level with your palm facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: dumbbell lying rear delt row
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Engaging your back muscles, lift the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying rear lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight down towards the floor, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Engaging your shoulder muscles, lift your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying single extension
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your arm fully extended above your chest.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbell in a controlled manner towards your forehead, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:3 Pause briefly at the bottom of the movement, then extend your arm back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell lying supine biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your back and head supported, and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying supine curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells down towards your forehead, bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell lying wide curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell neutral grip bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and your arms extended straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbells down towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell one arm bench fly
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting it on top of your thigh.
Step:2 Lie back on the bench, keeping the dumbbell pressed against your thigh.
Step:3 Using your free hand, help lift the dumbbell up to the starting position.
Step:4 Hold the dumbbell directly above your shoulder with your arm extended and palm facing inward.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbell out to the side in a wide arc, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:6 Pause when your arm is parallel to the ground, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.

name: dumbbell one arm bent-over row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing your body.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Let the dumbbell hang straight down towards the floor, with your arm fully extended.
Step:4 Pull the dumbbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbow close to your body and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: dumbbell one arm decline chest press
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with a dumbbell in one hand, resting on your chest.
Step:2 Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back pressed against the bench.
Step:3 Extend your arm and push the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, fully extending your elbow.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
nameFr: Haltère Un Bras Décliné Pectoraux Développé

name: dumbbell one arm hammer preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in one hand and your upper arm resting on the pad.
Step:2 Hold the dumbbell with a neutral grip (palms facing your body).
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
nameFr: Haltère Un Bras Marteau Pupitre Curl

name: dumbbell one arm incline chest press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the incline bench to a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip, resting it on your shoulder.
Step:4 Push the dumbbell up and away from your body, extending your arm fully.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
nameFr: Haltère Un Bras Incliné Pectoraux Développé

name: dumbbell one arm lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with your palm facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell to the side, keeping your arm straight and your palm facing down.
Step:4 Continue lifting until your arm is parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: dumbbell one arm prone curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down.
Step:2 Extend your arm fully, letting it hang straight down towards the floor.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell one arm prone hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing your body and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keep your upper arm stationary and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder, contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
nameFr: Haltère Un Bras Prone Marteau Curl

name: dumbbell one arm reverse grip press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing towards your body.
Step:2 Place your feet flat on the ground and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbow close to your body.
Step:4 Press the dumbbell upwards until your arm is fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
nameFr: Haltère Un Bras Prise inversée Prise Développé

name: dumbbell one arm reverse preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your arm extended over the edge of the bench, holding a dumbbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Lower the dumbbell slowly until your arm is fully extended.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbell back up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Squeeze your biceps at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
nameFr: Haltère Un Bras Prise inversée Pupitre Curl

name: dumbbell one arm reverse spider curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing down and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arm stationary, curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by flexing your elbow.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
nameFr: Haltère Un Bras Prise inversée Spider Curl

name: dumbbell one arm reverse wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip, palm facing down.
Step:3 Rest your forearm on your thigh, with your wrist hanging off the edge.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell towards the ground by flexing your wrist.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then slowly curl your wrist back up towards your body.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
nameFr: Haltère Un Bras Prise inversée Poignet Curl

name: dumbbell one arm seated hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other).
Step:3 Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
nameFr: Haltère Un Bras Assis Marteau Curl

name: dumbbell one arm shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder level, palm facing forward.
Step:2 Press the dumbbell upward until your arm is fully extended overhead.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: dumbbell one arm standing curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing forward and arm fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the weight upward while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell one arm standing hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Haltère Un Bras Debout Marteau Curl

name: dumbbell one arm upright row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the dumbbell hang at arm's length in front of your thighs, with your palm facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbell straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbow.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: dumbbell one arm wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your forearm on your thigh.
Step:3 Allow your wrist to extend, letting the dumbbell roll down towards your fingers.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrist back up, bringing the dumbbell towards your forearm.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other hand.

name: dumbbell one arm zottman preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench and hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Rest your upper arm on the preacher bench pad, allowing your arm to fully extend.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 At the top of the curl, rotate your wrist so that your palm faces up.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position, rotating your wrist back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
nameFr: Haltère Un Bras Zottman Pupitre Curl

name: dumbbell over bench neutral wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Haltère Penché Couché Neutral Poignet Curl

name: dumbbell over bench revers wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on the bench, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the dumbbells towards your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Haltère Penché Couché Revers Poignet Curl

name: dumbbell over bench wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your forearms resting on the bench and your palms facing up, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Allow your wrists to hang over the edge of the bench.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell palms in incline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the backrest and feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing inwards.
Step:4 Extend your arms straight up above your chest, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Lower the dumbbells slowly towards your shoulders, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then press the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Haltère Palms In Incliné Couché Développé

name: dumbbell peacher hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate the palms of your hands until they are facing forward.
Step:3 This will be your starting position.
Step:4 Now, keeping the upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Then, inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name: dumbbell preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against it.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing up and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell pronate-grip triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands, palms facing down, and extend your arms straight up overhead.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms close to your head and elbows pointing forward, slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell prone incline curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with your chest and stomach resting against it.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell prone incline hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 45-degree incline.
Step:2 Lie face down on the bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:3 Allow your arms to hang straight down towards the floor, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:6 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell push press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and dip your body down, then explosively extend your legs and press the dumbbells overhead.
Step:3 Lock out your arms at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbells back to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell rear fly
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight down towards the ground, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lift your arms out to the sides and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell rear lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell rear lateral raise (support head)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Raise your arms out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows, until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell revers grip biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell reverse bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your knees bent.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing towards your feet.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight up towards the ceiling, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells towards your chest, allowing your elbows to flare out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the dumbbells back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell reverse fly
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight down in front of you, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell reverse grip row (female)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing your body.
Step:3 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Let your arms hang straight down, fully extended, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:5 Pull the dumbbells up towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell reverse preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbells as you contract your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to curl the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell reverse spider curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell reverse wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip, palms facing down.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the dumbbells towards your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell romanian deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing your knees to bend slightly.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then push through your heels and engage your glutes to return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell scott press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated bench extension
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up above your head.
Step:3 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your elbows close to your ears.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated bent arm lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in each hand with your palms facing your body and your arms bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Keeping your elbows bent, raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your arms back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Haltère Assis Buste penché Bras Latéral Élévation

name: dumbbell seated bent over triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your head up.
Step:3 Extend your arms straight back, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Haltère Assis Buste penché Penché Triceps Extension

name: dumbbell seated bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench or chair with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Place the balls of your feet on a raised surface such as a step or block, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Hold onto the dumbbell for stability.
Step:4 Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your torso.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated front raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbells in front of you, with your palms facing down, until they are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated hammer curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your torso and arms extended straight down.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated inner biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on your thighs, allowing the dumbbells to hang down.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbells to your sides with a slight bend in your elbows, until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated lateral raise v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Raise the dumbbells to your sides with a slight bend in your elbows, until your arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated neutral wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing the dumbbells to hang down.
Step:3 Keeping your wrists in a neutral position, curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated palms up wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off the edge.
Step:3 Slowly curl your wrists upward, squeezing your forearms at the top of the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then lower your wrists back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Haltère Assis Palms Up Poignet Curl

name: dumbbell seated preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench with your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in one hand with an underhand grip, resting your upper arm against the preacher pad.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell seated revers grip concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Step:2 Rest your elbow on the inside of your thigh, just above the knee.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
nameFr: Haltère Assis Revers Prise Concentration Curl

name: dumbbell seated shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, resting on your thighs.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated shoulder press (parallel grip)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing inward.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell seated triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands and extend your arms straight up overhead.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell side plank with rear fly
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Place your forearm on the ground directly below your shoulder, keeping your elbow bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Hold a dumbbell in your top hand, with your arm extended straight down towards the ground.
Step:4 Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:5 While maintaining the side plank position, lift the dumbbell up towards the ceiling, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
nameFr: Haltère Side Plank Avec Arrière Écarté

name: dumbbell single arm overhead carry
instructions: Step:1 Stand tall with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Engage your core and keep your back straight as you walk forward, maintaining the dumbbell overhead.
Step:4 Continue walking for the desired distance or time.
Step:5 Switch hands and repeat the exercise.
nameFr: Haltère Single Bras Au-dessus de la tête Carry

name: dumbbell squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, lower your body down by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward and arms fully extended.
Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:3 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:4 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand.
Step:2 Raise your heels off the ground as high as possible, using your calves.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, with your arm fully extended and palm facing inwards.
Step:2 Place your opposite hand on your thigh for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: dumbbell standing front raise above head
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arms straight and lift the dumbbells in front of you, raising them above your head.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Haltère Debout Avant Élévation Above Head

name: dumbbell standing one arm concentration curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand, palm facing up.
Step:2 Place your free hand on your thigh for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arm stationary, exhale and curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.
nameFr: Haltère Debout Un Bras Concentration Curl

name: dumbbell standing one arm extension
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbell overhead, fully extending your arm.
Step:3 Keep your upper arm close to your head and perpendicular to the ground.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbell behind your head, bending your elbow.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing one arm reverse curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your arm fully extended and close to your body, with your palm facing down.
Step:3 Slowly curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.
nameFr: Haltère Debout Un Bras Prise inversée Curl

name: dumbbell standing overhead press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing forward.
Step:2 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to shoulder level.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Haltère Debout Au-dessus de la tête Développé

name: dumbbell standing palms in press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder level with your palms facing inwards.
Step:2 Keeping your core engaged and your back straight, press the dumbbells upwards until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand upright with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Rest the back of your upper arms against the preacher bench or an incline bench, with your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Continue to raise the dumbbells until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing reverse curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.

Step:2 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the weights while contracting your biceps. Continue to raise the weights until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level.
Step:3 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:4 Inhale and slowly begin to lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in one hand.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbell overhead, keeping your arm straight.
Step:3 Bend your elbow and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arm stationary.
Step:4 Extend your arm back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell standing zottman preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Place your upper arms against the preacher bench and keep your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing downward.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as well.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell stiff leg deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing a slight bend in your knees.
Step:3 Lower the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, then squeeze your glutes and push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Haltère Jambes tendues Jambe Soulevé de terre

name: dumbbell straight leg deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, hinge at the hips and lower the dumbbells towards the ground, allowing your torso to lean forward.
Step:3 Continue lowering the dumbbells until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings, keeping your knees slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then engage your glutes and hamstrings to lift your torso back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Haltère Jambes tendues Jambe Soulevé de terre

name: dumbbell sumo pull through
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointed outwards.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell with both hands in front of your body, arms extended.
Step:3 Bend your knees and lower your hips down into a squat position, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbell down between your legs, keeping your arms straight.
Step:5 Drive through your heels and extend your hips forward, pulling the dumbbell up and in front of your body.
Step:6 Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement, then lower the dumbbell back down between your legs.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell supported squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Step:2 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, slowly lower your body down by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell tate press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, then rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from you.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells up until your arms are fully extended, then lower them back down to shoulder height.
Step:4 Rotate your wrists back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell tricep kickback with stork stance
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold a dumbbell in your right hand.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Bring your right elbow up to your side, keeping it bent at a 90-degree angle.
Step:4 Extend your right arm straight back, squeezing your triceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
nameFr: Haltère Triceps Kickback Avec Stork Stance

name: dumbbell upright row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell upright row (back pov)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Let the dumbbells hang in front of your thighs, with your arms fully extended and your palms facing your body.
Step:3 Keeping your back straight and your core engaged, exhale and lift the dumbbells straight up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:4 Continue lifting until the dumbbells are at shoulder height, with your elbows pointing out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell w-press
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height, elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the dumbbells upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Lower the dumbbells back to shoulder height.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell waiter biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Step:2 Keep your upper arms close to your body and your elbows tucked in.
Step:3 Slowly curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your wrists straight.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell zottman curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing your body.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and rotate your palms to face forward.
Step:3 Curl the dumbbells up to your shoulders while keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing away from your body.
Step:5 Slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, rotating your palms back to facing your body.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbell zottman preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing up and elbows resting on the pad.
Step:2 Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders, keeping your upper arms stationary and your palms facing up.
Step:3 At the top of the curl, rotate your wrists so that your palms are facing down.
Step:4 Slowly lower the dumbbells back down to the starting position, rotating your wrists back to the starting position as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: dumbbells seated triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a dumbbell in both hands with an overhand grip, and raise it above your head.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping your upper arms close to your ears.
Step:4 Extend your arms and raise the dumbbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: elbow lift - reverse push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying face down on the ground with your legs extended and your hands placed directly under your shoulders.
Step:2 Engage your core and press through your palms to lift your upper body off the ground, keeping your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 Pause at the top for a moment, squeezing your upper back muscles.
Step:4 Slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez bar standing french press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Raise the barbell above your head, fully extending your arms.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms close to your head, slowly lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez barbell anti gravity press
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and holding the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Raise the barbell to shoulder height, keeping your elbows slightly bent and your palms facing forward.
Step:3 Press the barbell overhead, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Lower the barbell back to shoulder height and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez barbell close grip preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher curl bench and place your upper arms on the pad, gripping the ez barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Rest your triceps on the pad and fully extend your arms, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 Slowly curl the barbell towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Ez Barre Prise serrée Prise Pupitre Curl

name: ez barbell curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Step:3 Exhale as you curl the barbell up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale as you slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez barbell decline triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Lie on a decline bench with your head lower than your feet and your feet secured.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:4 Lower the barbell slowly towards your forehead, bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez barbell incline triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Extend your arms fully overhead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:4 Lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez barbell jm bench press
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with your feet flat on the ground and your back pressed against the bench.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in close to your body.
Step:4 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez barbell reverse grip curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Curl the barbell upwards by contracting your biceps, while exhaling.
Step:4 Continue to raise the barbell until your biceps are fully contracted and the barbell is at shoulder level.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your biceps.
Step:6 Slowly begin to bring the barbell back to the starting position as you inhale.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Ez Barre Prise inversée Prise Curl

name: ez barbell reverse grip preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a preacher bench with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Rest your upper arms on the pad, allowing your forearms to hang down.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Ez Barre Prise inversée Prise Pupitre Curl

name: ez barbell seated triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your back straight and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold the ez barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Raise the barbell overhead, fully extending your arms.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, lower the barbell behind your head by bending your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then raise the barbell back to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez barbell spider curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on a preacher bench or stability ball, allowing your elbows to hang down.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez barbell spider curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Rest your upper arms on a preacher bench or stability ball, allowing your elbows to hang down.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: ez-bar biceps curl (with arm blaster)
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:2 Place your upper arms against the arm blaster, keeping them stationary throughout the exercise.
Step:3 Keeping your elbows close to your body, exhale and curl the barbell up towards your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Ez-bar Biceps Curl Avec Bras Blaster)

name: ez-barbell standing wide grip biceps curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand up straight with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the ez barbell with an underhand grip, hands wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Keep your elbows close to your torso and your upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Step:3 Curl the barbell up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Ez-barbell Debout Prise large Prise Biceps Curl

name: floor fly (with barbell)
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back on the floor with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Hold a barbell with an overhand grip, arms extended straight up over your chest.
Step:3 Slowly lower the barbell out to the sides, keeping a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:4 Lower the barbell until your arms are parallel to the floor, feeling a stretch in your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then squeeze your chest muscles to bring the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: forward lunge (male)
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet hip-width apart and hands on your hips.
Step:2 Take a big step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 Bend your right knee to about 90 degrees, keeping your knee aligned with your ankle.
Step:4 Push off with your right foot and return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat with your left leg, alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: frog crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: front plank with twist
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:2 Engage your core and glutes to maintain a stable position.
Step:3 Rotate your torso to the right, lifting your right arm and extending it towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Keep your hips and legs stable as you twist.
Step:5 Hold for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the twist on the left side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: gironda sternum chin
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a high bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Reach up and grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:4 Engage your lats and biceps to pull your chest up towards the bar, leading with your sternum.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: gorilla chin
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your palms facing away from you.
Step:4 Engage your core and pull your body up towards the bar, bringing your chin above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: groin crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: hyght dumbbell fly
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a bench with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing each other.
Step:2 Extend your arms straight up over your chest, with a slight bend in your elbows.
Step:3 Keeping a slight bend in your elbows, lower the dumbbells out to the sides in a wide arc until you feel a stretch in your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement and bring the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: incline push-up
instructions: Step:1 Place your hands on an elevated surface, such as a bench or step, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the elevated surface by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: incline reverse grip push-up
instructions: Step:1 Place your hands on the edge of a bench or elevated surface, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend your legs behind you, resting on the balls of your feet, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the bench by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: incline scapula push up
instructions: Step:1 Set up an incline bench at a 45-degree angle.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bench slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Position your feet on the ground, hip-width apart.
Step:4 Lower your chest towards the bench, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 As you lower, retract your shoulder blades, squeezing your scapulae together.
Step:6 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: inverse leg curl (bench support)
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a bench with your hips at the edge and your legs extended straight behind you.
Step:2 Hold onto the bench for support.
Step:3 Keeping your upper body still, bend your knees and curl your legs towards your glutes.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly extend your legs back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: inverted row
instructions: Step:1 Set up a bar at waist height or use a suspension trainer.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar or suspension trainer, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grab the bar or handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lean back, keeping your body straight and your heels on the ground.
Step:5 Pull your chest towards the bar or handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: inverted row bent knees
instructions: Step:1 Set up a bar at waist height and lie underneath it.
Step:2 Grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Position your body so that your heels are on the ground and your body is straight.
Step:4 Pull your chest up towards the bar by squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: inverted row on bench
instructions: Step:1 Set up a bench at a height that allows your body to hang freely underneath it.
Step:2 Lie face up on the ground with your head towards the bench.
Step:3 Reach up and grab the bench with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Position your body so that your heels are on the ground and your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull your chest up towards the bench.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: inverted row v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Set up a bar at waist height on a Smith machine or use a suspension trainer.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar or suspension trainer and grab it with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Walk your feet forward, leaning back until your body is at a slight angle.
Step:4 Keep your body straight and pull your chest up towards the bar or handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: inverted row with straps
instructions: Step:1 Set up a suspension trainer or straps at chest height.
Step:2 Stand facing the anchor point and grab the handles with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Walk your feet forward, leaning back until your body is at an angle.
Step:4 Keep your body straight and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull your chest towards the handles, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower yourself back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: knee touch crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, lift your shoulder blades off the ground and reach your right hand towards your left knee.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat, this time reaching your left hand towards your right knee.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: l-pull-up
instructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your lats and biceps to pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: landmine lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, resting it on the front of your shoulders.
Step:3 Keeping your core engaged and back straight, lift the barbell up and away from your body, raising it to shoulder height.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: leg pull in flat bench
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a flat bench with your legs extended straight out in front of you.
Step:2 Place your hands on the bench beside your hips for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your legs off the ground, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever back extension
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body size and range of motion.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet secured.
Step:3 Place your hands on the handles or grip bars.
Step:4 Engage your core and slowly lean forward, allowing your back to round slightly.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom position, feeling a stretch in your lower back.
Step:6 Using your back muscles, slowly raise your torso back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever bent over row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Hold the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and chest up.
Step:4 Pull the barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up, and keep your elbows close to your sides.
Step:3 Exhale and curl the handles upward, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever calf press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the leverage machine so that your shoulders are aligned with the lever pad.
Step:2 Place your toes on the lever pad, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or side supports for stability.
Step:4 Push the lever pad down by extending your ankles, contracting your calf muscles.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement.
Step:6 Slowly return to the starting position by allowing your heels to rise back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever chest press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Step:4 Pause briefly at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever chest press
