instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Step:4 Pause briefly at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and foot platform to your desired position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the foot platform.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and push through your heels to lift the weight up.
Step:5 Keep your back straight and avoid rounding your shoulders.
Step:6 Extend your hips fully at the top of the movement, squeezing your glutes.
Step:7 Lower the weight back down in a controlled manner, keeping tension on your glutes and hamstrings.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever decline chest press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Slowly lower the handles back towards your chest, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever donkey calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the leverage machine to the appropriate height for your body.
Step:2 Position yourself facing the machine, with your toes on the foot platform and your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Place your hands on the handles or the support bars for stability.
Step:4 Engage your calves and lift your heels as high as possible, using the balls of your feet.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever front pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit upright with your chest lifted and your shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Engage your lats and pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever hammer grip preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Place your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your chest is pressed against it.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with a hammer grip (palms facing each other).
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever hip extension v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Place your feet on the footrests and grip the handles for stability.
Step:3 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, then push against the footrests to extend your hips and raise your legs backward.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever incline chest press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then slowly bend your elbows and lower the handles back towards your chest.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever incline chest press v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest angle on the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles forward and away from your body until your arms are fully extended, but without locking your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position, then slowly bend your elbows and lower the handles back towards your chest.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever lateral raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms straight.
Step:3 Exhale and raise your arms out to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then inhale and slowly lower your arms back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever leg extension
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the machine to fit your body.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footpad.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or sidebars for stability.
Step:4 Extend your legs forward by straightening your knees, lifting the weight.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the weight back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever lying leg curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and select the desired weight.
Step:2 Lie face down on the machine with your legs straight and your heels against the padded lever.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Keeping your upper body stationary, exhale and curl your legs up as far as possible without lifting your hips off the pad.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the lever back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever military press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever narrow grip seated row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footrests to ensure proper form.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your feet flat on the footrests and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with a narrow grip, palms facing each other.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and lean slightly forward.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement.
Step:7 Slowly release the handles and return to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever one arm bent over row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Bend forward at the hips, keeping your back straight and your head up.
Step:3 Let the barbell hang in front of you with your arms fully extended.
Step:4 Pull the barbell up towards your chest, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:5 Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top of the movement.
Step:6 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Levier Un Bras Buste penché Penché Rowing

name: lever one arm lateral high row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself facing the machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with one hand and keep your back straight.
Step:3 Pull the handle towards your body, keeping your elbow close to your side.
Step:4 Squeeze your back muscles at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Slowly release the handle back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Levier Un Bras Latéral Haut Rowing

name: lever one arm lateral wide pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handle with an overhand grip and fully extend your arm, keeping a slight bend in your elbow.
Step:3 Pull the handle down and across your body towards your opposite hip, squeezing your lat muscle at the bottom of the movement.
Step:4 Slowly return the handle to the starting position, fully extending your arm.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.
nameFr: Levier Un Bras Latéral Prise large Tirage vertical

name: lever one arm shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the lever handle with one hand and position your elbow at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Press the lever upward until your arm is fully extended overhead.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the lever back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: lever overhand triceps dip
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to the appropriate height and secure your body in position.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your body so that your arms are fully extended.
Step:3 Lower your body by bending your elbows, keeping your upper arms close to your sides.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by extending your elbows.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Place your upper arms on the pad and grip the handles with an underhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your elbows positioned on the pad.
Step:4 Exhale and curl your forearms towards your upper arms, contracting your biceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever preacher curl v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your upper arms resting on the pad and your chest against the support.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your upper arms stationary and exhale as you curl the handles towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:5 Inhale as you slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever reverse grip lateral pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Pull the handles down towards your chest, leading with your elbows and squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Levier Prise inversée Prise Latéral Tirage vertical

name: lever reverse grip preacher curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:3 Rest your upper arms on the preacher pad, ensuring your elbows are fully extended.
Step:4 Keeping your upper arms stationary, exhale and curl the handles towards your shoulders.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the handles back to the starting position, fully extending your elbows.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Levier Prise inversée Prise Pupitre Curl

name: lever reverse grip vertical row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, palms facing up.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Levier Prise inversée Prise Vertical Rowing

name: lever reverse t-bar row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footplate position on the leverage machine.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever rotary calf
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate.
Step:2 Place your toes on the footplate, with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push through the balls of your feet, raising your heels as high as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated calf press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the machine so that your shoulders are aligned with the lever pad.
Step:2 Place your toes on the lower portion of the platform and position your knees under the lever pad.
Step:3 Grasp the handles on the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Press the lever pad down by extending your ankles, lifting your heels as high as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your knees are slightly bent and your feet are flat on the footplate.
Step:2 Place your toes on the footplate with your heels hanging off the edge.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or the sides of the seat for stability.
Step:4 Push through the balls of your feet to raise your heels as high as possible.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated crunch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles or place your hands on the side pads for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly lean back, allowing the pad to move with you.
Step:4 Once your upper body is at a 45-degree angle, contract your abs and crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly release and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated crunch (chest pad)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and chest pad position according to your comfort.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the chest pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or side bars for stability.
Step:4 Engage your abs and slowly lean back, allowing the chest pad to move with you.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the maximum contraction, feeling the tension in your abs.
Step:6 Slowly return to the starting position by contracting your abs and pulling yourself back up.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated crunch v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the pad and your feet secured under the footpads.
Step:2 Place your hands on the handles or the sides of the seat for support.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly crunch forward, bringing your chest towards your knees.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your abs.
Step:5 Slowly return to the starting position, allowing your back to round slightly.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated dip
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that your feet are flat on the ground and your knees are at a 90-degree angle.
Step:2 Grasp the handles of the leverage machine with your palms facing down and your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Slowly lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated fly
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with a pronated grip and keep your elbows slightly bent.
Step:3 Exhale and push the handles forward, bringing them together in front of your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, squeezing your chest muscles.
Step:5 Inhale and slowly return to the starting position, allowing your chest muscles to stretch.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated leg curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to fit your body and sit on it with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Place your lower legs under the padded lever, just above your ankles.
Step:3 Grasp the handles on the sides of the machine for support.
Step:4 Keeping your upper legs stationary, exhale and curl your legs up as far as possible.
Step:5 Hold the contracted position for a brief pause as you squeeze your hamstrings.
Step:6 Inhale and slowly lower the lever back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated leg raise crunch
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the leverage machine with your back against the backrest and your feet on the footrests.
Step:2 Grasp the handles or sidebars for stability.
Step:3 Engage your abs and slowly raise your legs up towards your chest, curling your torso forward at the same time.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs and torso back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated reverse fly
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and keep your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever seated reverse fly (parallel grip)
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with a parallel grip, palms facing each other, and keep your arms slightly bent.
Step:3 Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together as you pull the handles back and outward, away from your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then inhale and slowly return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Levier Assis Prise inversée Écarté (parallel Prise

name: lever shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the backrest.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at shoulder level.
Step:3 Push the handles upward until your arms are fully extended, but do not lock your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever shoulder press v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever shoulder press v. 3
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and backrest of the leverage machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles of the machine with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Push the handles upward and forward until your arms are fully extended, but not locked.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever standing calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the machine to your height and stand with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place your shoulders under the pads and hold onto the handles for stability.
Step:3 Raise your heels as high as possible by extending your ankles.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever standing chest press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your hands at chest level.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then slowly bring the handles back towards your chest, maintaining control throughout the movement.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever t bar row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and footplate position to ensure proper alignment.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:5 Pull the handles towards your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the peak contraction, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lever t-bar reverse grip row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and engage your core.
Step:4 Pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release and extend your arms back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Levier T-bar Prise inversée Prise Rowing

name: lever triceps extension
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and fully extend your arms in front of you.
Step:3 Keeping your upper arms stationary, slowly lower the handles towards your forehead by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the handles back up to the starting position by extending your arms.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lower back curl
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your stomach with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.
Step:2 Engage your glutes and hamstrings, and slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling your back upwards.
Step:3 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lunge with twist
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Take a step forward with your right foot, lowering your body into a lunge position.
Step:3 As you lunge, twist your torso to the right, bringing your left elbow towards your right knee.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side, stepping forward with your left foot and twisting your torso to the left.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: lying leg raise flat bench
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on a flat bench with your back pressed against it.
Step:2 Place your hands under your glutes for support.
Step:3 Keep your legs straight and together, and lift them up towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: machine inner chest press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your back flat against the pad.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and position your elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Step:3 Push the handles forward until your arms are fully extended, exhaling during the movement.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the end of the movement, then slowly return to the starting position, inhaling as you do so.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: mixed grip chin-up
instructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip (palms facing towards you) and your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your feet off the ground.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: modified hindu push-up (male)
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet hip-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground, bending your elbows and keeping your core engaged.
Step:3 As you lower your body, shift your weight back and lift your hips up towards the ceiling, creating an inverted V shape with your body.
Step:4 Continue to lower your body until your chest is just above the ground, then reverse the movement, pushing your hips back down and extending your arms to return to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: modified push up to lower arms
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body down towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 Once your elbows are at a 90-degree angle, lower your forearms to the ground, keeping your elbows directly under your shoulders.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then push through your palms to lift your forearms back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Modified Poussée Up To Lower Arms

name: negative crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:3 Engaging your abs, slowly lift your upper body off the ground, curling forward until your torso is at a 45-degree angle.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your upper body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: oblique crunch v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Place your hands behind your head or cross them over your chest.
Step:3 Engage your abs and lift your shoulder blades off the ground, rotating your torso to one side.
Step:4 Pause for a moment, then lower your shoulder blades back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
Step:6 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: one arm chin-up
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a pull-up bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Reach up and grab the bar with an underhand grip, with one hand gripping the bar and the other hand holding your wrist for support.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arm fully extended, keeping your body straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull yourself up towards the bar by bending your elbow and squeezing your back muscles.
Step:5 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar, then slowly lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms and repeat.

name: one arm dip
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing away from a bench or chair, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Place one hand on the bench or chair behind you, fingers pointing towards your body.
Step:3 Extend your legs out in front of you, keeping your heels on the ground.
Step:4 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench or chair.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides and repeat with the other arm.

name: one arm towel row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent, and hold a towel with one hand.
Step:2 Bend forward at the waist, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 Extend your arm fully, allowing the towel to hang in front of you.
Step:4 Pull the towel towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the towel back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch arms.

name: outside leg kick push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 As you push back up, kick one leg out to the side, extending it fully and engaging your glutes.
Step:4 Return your leg to the starting position and repeat the push-up, alternating legs with each repetition.
Step:5 Continue alternating leg kicks and push-ups for the desired number of repetitions.

name: overhead triceps stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand or sit upright with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Extend one arm overhead, bending at the elbow so that your hand reaches towards the opposite shoulder blade.
Step:3 With your other hand, gently pull the elbow of the extended arm towards the opposite side of your head, feeling a stretch in your triceps.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.
nameFr: Au-dessus de la tête Triceps Stretch

name: power point plank
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:2 Engage your core and squeeze your glutes to maintain a stable position.
Step:3 Lower your body down onto your forearms, one arm at a time, maintaining a straight line from head to toe.
Step:4 Hold this position for the desired amount of time, keeping your core and glutes engaged.
Step:5 To return to the starting position, push through your forearms and lift your body back up into a high plank position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: pull up (neutral grip)
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and your arms fully extended.
Step:2 Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:3 Pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbows and driving your elbows down towards your hips.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: pull-up
instructions: Step:1 Hang from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended.
Step:2 Engage your core and squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Step:3 Pull your body up towards the bar by bending your elbows and bringing your chest towards the bar.
Step:4 Pause at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: push and pull bodyweight
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight.
Step:3 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:4 From the push-up position, pull your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body straight.
Step:5 Push through your palms to extend your arms and return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Poussée And Pull Poids du corps

name: push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:3 Pause for a moment when your chest is just above the ground, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: push-up (wall)
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away.
Step:2 Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step back a few feet, keeping your body straight and your feet hip-width apart.
Step:4 Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body in a straight line.
Step:5 Push back up to the starting position, straightening your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: push-up (wall) v. 2
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall, about arm's length away.
Step:2 Place your hands on the wall at shoulder height, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step back with your feet, keeping them hip-width apart.
Step:4 Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:5 Bend your elbows and lower your chest towards the wall, keeping your body straight.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: push-up inside leg kick
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:3 As you push back up, lift one leg off the ground and kick it out to the side, keeping it straight.
Step:4 Lower your leg back down and repeat the push-up, then switch to the other leg.
Step:5 Continue alternating leg kicks with each push-up repetition.

name: push-up on lower arms
instructions: Step:1 Start in a plank position with your forearms on the ground and elbows directly below your shoulders.
Step:2 Engage your core and keep your body in a straight line from head to toe.
Step:3 Lower your chest towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your body.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: push-up plus
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 Once your chest is just above the ground, push through your hands to extend your arms and lift your upper body up.
Step:4 At the top of the movement, protract your shoulder blades by pushing your upper back towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then reverse the movement by retracting your shoulder blades and lowering your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: push-up to side plank
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your core engaged.
Step:3 Push back up to the starting position.
Step:4 Shift your weight onto your left hand and rotate your body to the right, lifting your right arm towards the ceiling.
Step:5 Hold the side plank position for a few seconds, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat the push-up and side plank on the opposite side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: raise single arm push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Extend one arm straight out to the side, parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:4 Push back up to the starting position, using your chest muscles to lift your body.
Step:5 Repeat with the other arm extended.

name: rear pull-up
instructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: reverse crunch
instructions: Step:1 Lie flat on your back with your arms extended along your sides.
Step:2 Bend your knees and lift your feet off the ground, bringing your thighs perpendicular to the floor.
Step:3 Contract your abs and curl your hips off the floor, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your hips back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: reverse dip
instructions: Step:1 Position yourself between two parallel bars with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:2 Lower your body by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:3 Pause for a moment, then push yourself back up to the starting position by straightening your arms.
Step:4 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: reverse grip machine lat pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your knees under the pads and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Sit upright with your chest out and shoulders back, maintaining a slight arch in your lower back.
Step:4 Pull the handles down towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Prise inversée Prise Machine Lat Tirage vertical

name: reverse grip pull-up
instructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:4 Continue pulling until your chin is above the bar.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: reverse hyper on flat bench
instructions: Step:1 Lie face down on a flat bench with your hips at the edge and your legs hanging off the bench.
Step:2 Hold onto the bench for stability.
Step:3 Keeping your legs straight, raise them up towards the ceiling as high as you can.
Step:4 Squeeze your glutes at the top of the movement.
Step:5 Slowly lower your legs back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Prise inversée Hyper On Flat Couché

name: reverse plank with leg lift
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the ground with your legs extended in front of you and your hands resting on the ground behind you, fingers pointing towards your feet.
Step:2 Press through your hands and lift your hips off the ground, coming into a reverse plank position.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift one leg off the ground, extending it straight up towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Hold for a moment, then lower your leg back down.
Step:5 Repeat with the other leg.
Step:6 Continue alternating legs for the desired number of repetitions.

name: rocky pull-up pulldown
instructions: Step:1 Stand in front of a pull-up bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Reach up and grab the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body straight.
Step:4 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: scapula push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands directly under your shoulders and your body in a straight line.
Step:2 Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping your elbows close to your body.
Step:3 As you lower, squeeze your shoulder blades together and push your chest forward.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: scapular pull-up
instructions: Step:1 Start by hanging from a pull-up bar with your palms facing away from you and your arms fully extended.
Step:2 Retract your shoulder blades by pulling them down and back.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar, focusing on squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: seated calf stretch (male)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a chair or bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Extend one leg straight out in front of you, keeping your heel on the ground.
Step:3 Lean forward slightly, feeling a stretch in your calf muscle.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:5 Switch legs and repeat the stretch.

name: seated side crunch (wall)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the floor with your back against a wall and your legs extended in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees and place your feet flat on the floor, hip-width apart.
Step:3 Place your hands behind your head with your elbows pointing outwards.
Step:4 Engage your abs and lean to one side, bringing your elbow towards your hip.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: shoulder grip pull-up
instructions: Step:1 Grab the pull-up bar with a shoulder-width grip, palms facing away from you.
Step:2 Hang freely with your arms fully extended.
Step:3 Engage your back muscles and pull your body up towards the bar until your chin is above the bar.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your body back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: shoulder tap push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a high plank position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Step:2 Lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping them close to your sides.
Step:3 As you push back up, lift your right hand off the ground and tap your left shoulder.
Step:4 Return your right hand to the ground and repeat the push-up, this time lifting your left hand and tapping your right shoulder.
Step:5 Continue alternating shoulder taps with each push-up repetition.
Step:6 Maintain a stable core and avoid excessive hip rotation throughout the exercise.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: side plank hip adduction
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Prop yourself up on your forearm, keeping your elbow directly below your shoulder.
Step:3 Engage your core and lift your hips off the ground, creating a straight line from your head to your feet.
Step:4 While maintaining the side plank position, lift your top leg towards the ceiling, keeping it straight.
Step:5 Slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: side push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start by lying on your side with your legs extended and stacked on top of each other.
Step:2 Place your bottom hand on the ground directly under your shoulder, fingers pointing forward.
Step:3 Press through your bottom hand to lift your body off the ground, keeping your legs straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Extend your top arm straight up towards the ceiling, creating a straight line from your head to your heels.
Step:5 Lower your body back down to the starting position with control.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch sides.

name: side wrist pull stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended in front of you.
Step:2 Extend your right arm out to the side, parallel to the ground, with your palm facing down.
Step:3 With your left hand, grab your right hand and gently pull it towards your body, feeling a stretch in your right forearm.
Step:4 Hold the stretch for 15-30 seconds, then release.
Step:5 Repeat on the other side.

name: side-to-side chin
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Hang from the bar with your arms fully extended and your body relaxed.
Step:4 Pull yourself up by bending your elbows and bringing your chin towards the bar, while keeping your body straight.
Step:5 Once your chin is above the bar, lower yourself back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: single arm push-up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands shoulder-width apart and one hand placed slightly wider than the other.
Step:2 Engage your core and lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows, keeping your back straight.
Step:3 As you lower yourself, shift your weight to one side and lift the opposite arm off the ground, extending it straight out to the side.
Step:4 Push through your chest and triceps to raise your body back up to the starting position, while simultaneously lowering your extended arm back to the ground.
Step:5 Repeat the movement, alternating the arm you extend with each repetition.

name: sissy squat
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:2 Hold onto a stable object for balance if needed.
Step:3 Slowly lower your body by bending your knees and leaning back, keeping your torso upright.
Step:4 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or as far as you can comfortably go.
Step:5 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith behind neck press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance.
Step:5 Lower the bar down to the back of your neck, keeping your elbows pointing forward.
Step:6 Press the bar up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to chest level.
Step:2 Lie flat on the bench with your feet firmly planted on the ground.
Step:3 Grip the bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the bar and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the bar touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the bar back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith bent over row
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Pull the bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith chair squat
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:3 Place the barbell across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:4 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you slowly lower your body by bending your knees and hips.
Step:5 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:6 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith deadlift
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointing slightly outward.
Step:3 Bend at the hips and knees, keeping your back straight and chest up, and grip the bar with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Engage your core and lift the bar by extending your hips and knees, keeping the bar close to your body.
Step:5 Stand up straight, fully extending your hips and knees.
Step:6 Lower the bar back down by bending at the hips and knees, maintaining control and keeping your back straight.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith decline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the decline bench to the desired angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith decline reverse-grip press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine to a decline position.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a reverse grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith front squat (clean grip)
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand facing the barbell with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Step back and position the barbell on your front shoulders, resting it on your collarbone and deltoids.
Step:5 Keep your chest up, back straight, and core engaged.
Step:6 Lower your body by bending at the knees and hips, as if sitting back into a chair.
Step:7 Continue lowering until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:8 Pause for a moment, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith full squat
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at shoulder height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:3 Step under the bar and position it across your upper back, resting on your traps.
Step:4 Grip the bar with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Unrack the bar and take a step back, maintaining a stable stance.
Step:6 Keeping your chest up and core engaged, initiate the squat by pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:7 Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as your flexibility allows.
Step:8 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then drive through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith hack squat
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the barbell on the smith machine to an appropriate height for your body.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly pointed outwards.
Step:3 Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders.
Step:4 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you unrack the barbell.
Step:6 Take a step back and position your feet slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:7 Bend your knees and lower your body down, keeping your chest up and back straight.
Step:8 Continue descending until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:9 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:10 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith incline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a 30-45 degree incline.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back flat against the pad and feet firmly on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your upper chest, keeping your elbows slightly tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith incline reverse-grip press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the smith machine to a comfortable incline angle.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip that is slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the bar and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the bar is just above your chest.
Step:6 Push the bar back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith leg press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat and footplate of the smith machine to a comfortable position.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the backrest and your feet shoulder-width apart on the footplate.
Step:3 Grasp the handles or sides of the machine for stability.
Step:4 Push the footplate away from you by extending your legs, keeping your back against the backrest.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the fully extended position.
Step:6 Slowly bend your knees and lower the footplate back towards you, returning to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith low bar squat
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at a height that allows you to comfortably rest it on your upper back.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned outwards.
Step:3 Step under the bar and position it across your upper back, resting it on your traps.
Step:4 Grip the bar with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Unrack the bar by straightening your legs and stepping back from the rack.
Step:6 Take a deep breath and brace your core.
Step:7 Initiate the squat by pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:8 Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:9 Keep your chest up and your back straight throughout the movement.
Step:10 Drive through your heels to stand back up, extending your hips and knees.
Step:11 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith machine bicep curl
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to be at waist level.
Step:2 Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Keep your elbows close to your sides and your upper arms stationary.
Step:5 Exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders, contracting your biceps.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, squeezing your biceps.
Step:7 Inhale and slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith machine incline tricep extension
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder height.
Step:2 Sit on the bench with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Extend your arms fully, lifting the bar off the rack and holding it directly above your chest.
Step:5 Lower the bar slowly towards your forehead, keeping your elbows close to your head.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith narrow row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your feet flat on the floor.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly narrower than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your chest up as you pull the handles towards your body, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the peak of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith one arm row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to waist level.
Step:2 Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with one hand using an overhand grip, with your palm facing down.
Step:5 Keep your elbow close to your body and pull the bar towards your waist, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the bar back to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, then switch to the other arm.

name: smith rear delt row
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the machine with your chest against the pad and your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your core engaged as you pull the handles towards your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top of the movement, then slowly release the handles back to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith reverse calf raises
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off.
Step:4 Hold onto the bar for support.
Step:5 Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith reverse calf raises
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine bar to a height just below your shoulders.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet hip-width apart and toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Place the balls of your feet on the edge of a step or platform, with your heels hanging off.
Step:4 Hold onto the bar for support, keeping your back straight and core engaged.
Step:5 Raise your heels as high as possible, lifting your body weight onto the balls of your feet.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith reverse grip bent over row
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the bar at hip height.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Bend your knees slightly and hinge forward at the hips, keeping your back straight.
Step:4 Grasp the bar with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Pull the bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Smith Prise inversée Prise Buste penché Penché Rowing

name: smith reverse-grip press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the height of the smith machine bar to chest level.
Step:2 Stand facing the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Step back and position yourself with a slight bend in your knees.
Step:5 Keep your chest up and core engaged throughout the exercise.
Step:6 Lower the bar towards your chest, keeping your elbows tucked in.
Step:7 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push the bar back up to the starting position.
Step:8 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith seated shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height so that the handles are at shoulder level.
Step:2 Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and your feet flat on the floor.
Step:3 Grasp the handles with an overhand grip and lift them off the supports, extending your arms fully.
Step:4 Lower the handles down to shoulder level, keeping your elbows slightly bent.
Step:5 Press the handles up overhead until your arms are fully extended.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the handles back down to shoulder level.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith seated wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench in front of a Smith machine with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an underhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Rest your forearms on your thighs, allowing your wrists to hang off.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upward, bringing the barbell towards your forearms.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith shoulder press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height and position yourself on the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the bar off the rack and position it at shoulder level, with your elbows bent and palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the bar upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the bar back down to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith sprint lunge
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height.
Step:2 Stand facing away from the machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Step back with your right foot and place it on the barbell, resting the top of your foot on the bar.
Step:4 Bend your left knee and lower your body into a lunge position, keeping your back straight.
Step:5 Push through your left heel to return to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat on the other side, stepping back with your left foot.
Step:7 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith squat
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at an appropriate height for your squat.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes slightly turned out.
Step:3 Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper traps and shoulders.
Step:4 Grip the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:5 Engage your core and unrack the barbell, stepping back to clear the rack.
Step:6 Keeping your chest up and back straight, initiate the squat by bending at the hips and knees.
Step:7 Lower your body until your thighs are parallel to the ground or slightly below.
Step:8 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then drive through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith standing back wrist curl
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing the smith machine with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your elbows close to your body.
Step:4 Slowly curl your wrists upwards, bringing the barbell towards your body.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith standing behind head military press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the seat height of the smith machine so that the bar is at shoulder level.
Step:2 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:3 Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Lift the bar off the rack and step back, maintaining a stable stance.
Step:5 Position the bar behind your head, resting on your upper traps.
Step:6 Keep your core engaged and your chest lifted throughout the exercise.
Step:7 Press the bar overhead by extending your arms, fully straightening them.
Step:8 Pause briefly at the top of the movement, then slowly lower the bar back down to the starting position.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Smith Debout Behind Head Militaire Développé

name: smith standing leg calf raise
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the smith machine bar to a height that allows you to stand with your feet flat on the ground and your shoulders under the bar.
Step:2 Position yourself under the bar with your feet shoulder-width apart and your toes pointing forward.
Step:3 Place your hands on the bar for stability.
Step:4 Engage your calves and slowly raise your heels off the ground, lifting your body up onto your toes.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower your heels back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith standing military press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and your knees slightly bent.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Lift the barbell off the rack and bring it down to shoulder level, with your palms facing forward.
Step:4 Press the barbell upward until your arms are fully extended overhead.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to shoulder level.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith sumo squat
instructions: Step:1 Set up the smith machine with the barbell at hip height.
Step:2 Stand with your feet wider than shoulder-width apart, toes pointing outwards.
Step:3 Position yourself under the barbell, resting it on your upper back and shoulders.
Step:4 Engage your core and keep your chest up as you lower your body down into a squat position, pushing your hips back and bending your knees.
Step:5 Lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the ground, or as low as you can comfortably go.
Step:6 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith upright row
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, facing the smith machine.
Step:2 Grasp the barbell with an overhand grip, hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and your core engaged.
Step:4 Pull the barbell up towards your chin, leading with your elbows.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: smith wide grip bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the bench to a comfortable position on the smith machine.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet flat on the ground.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows out to the sides.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Smith Prise large Prise Couché Développé

name: smith wide grip decline bench press
instructions: Step:1 Adjust the decline bench to the desired angle.
Step:2 Lie down on the bench with your feet secured under the foot pads.
Step:3 Grasp the barbell with a wide grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.
Step:4 Unrack the barbell and lower it slowly towards your chest, keeping your elbows pointed outwards.
Step:5 Pause for a moment when the barbell touches your chest.
Step:6 Push the barbell back up to the starting position, fully extending your arms.
Step:7 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Smith Prise large Prise Décliné Couché Développé

name: snatch pull
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and the barbell on the ground in front of you.
Step:2 Bend your knees and hinge at the hips to lower into a squat position, gripping the barbell with an overhand grip.
Step:3 Keep your back straight and chest up as you drive through your heels to lift the barbell off the ground, extending your hips and knees.
Step:4 As the barbell reaches hip level, explosively pull it upwards, shrugging your shoulders and pulling your elbows high and to the sides.
Step:5 As the barbell reaches its highest point, quickly drop underneath it, pulling yourself into a deep squat position.
Step:6 Catch the barbell overhead with your arms fully extended and your knees bent.
Step:7 Stand up by extending your hips and knees, keeping the barbell overhead.
Step:8 Lower the barbell back down to the starting position by reversing the movement.
Step:9 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: spider crawl push up
instructions: Step:1 Start in a push-up position with your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width apart and your feet together.
Step:2 Bring your right knee towards your right elbow, keeping it off the ground.
Step:3 As you bring your right knee back, simultaneously lower your body towards the ground by bending your elbows.
Step:4 Push back up to the starting position and repeat with your left knee towards your left elbow.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides for the desired number of repetitions.

name: squat jerk
instructions: Step:1 Start with the barbell resting on your shoulders, with your feet shoulder-width apart.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position, keeping your chest up and your knees tracking over your toes.
Step:3 As you reach the bottom of the squat, explosively drive through your legs and push the barbell overhead.
Step:4 As the barbell reaches its peak, quickly drop into a split position, with one foot forward and one foot back.
Step:5 Catch the barbell overhead with your arms fully extended and your back knee slightly touching the ground.
Step:6 Stand up from the split position, bringing your feet back together.
Step:7 Lower the barbell back to your shoulders and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: squat to overhead reach
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Lower your body down into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 As you come up from the squat, extend your arms overhead, reaching towards the ceiling.
Step:4 Return to the starting position by lowering your arms and bending your knees to squat down again.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
nameFr: Squat To Au-dessus de la tête Reach

name: squat to overhead reach with twist
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and toes slightly turned out.
Step:2 Lower your body into a squat position by bending your knees and pushing your hips back.
Step:3 As you come up from the squat, raise your arms overhead and twist your torso to one side.
Step:4 Return to the starting position and repeat the squat, this time twisting your torso to the opposite side.
Step:5 Continue alternating sides with each squat repetition.
nameFr: Squat To Au-dessus de la tête Reach Avec Twist

name: stalder press
instructions: Step:1 Start by standing with your feet shoulder-width apart and your arms extended overhead.
Step:2 Bend your knees slightly and engage your core.
Step:3 Lower your body down into a squat position while keeping your arms extended overhead.
Step:4 As you squat down, press your arms down towards the ground, engaging your triceps.
Step:5 Pause for a moment at the bottom of the squat, then push through your heels to stand back up while simultaneously raising your arms back overhead.
Step:6 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: standing behind neck press
instructions: Step:1 Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart and hold the barbell behind your neck with an overhand grip.
Step:2 Keep your back straight and core engaged.
Step:3 Press the barbell overhead by extending your arms, fully extending your elbows.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the top, then slowly lower the barbell back down to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: standing calves calf stretch
instructions: Step:1 Stand facing a wall or sturdy object, about an arm's length away.
Step:2 Place your hands on the wall or object at shoulder height.
Step:3 Step back with one foot, keeping your heel flat on the ground.
Step:4 Bend your front knee slightly and lean forward, keeping your back leg straight.
Step:5 You should feel a stretch in your calf muscle.
Step:6 Hold the stretch for 20-30 seconds.
Step:7 Repeat on the other leg.

name: three bench dip
instructions: Step:1 Sit on a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body until your upper arms are parallel to the ground.
Step:4 Push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: triceps dip
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench or chair with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Slide your butt off the bench, supporting your weight with your hands.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Step:4 Pause for a moment at the bottom, then push yourself back up to the starting position.
Step:5 Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: triceps dip (bench leg)
instructions: Step:1 Sit on the edge of a bench with your hands gripping the edge, fingers pointing forward.
Step:2 Walk your feet forward, sliding your butt off the bench, and straighten your arms.
Step:3 Bend your elbows and lower your body towards the ground, keeping your back close to the bench.
Step:4 Push through your palms to straighten your arms and return to the starting position.
